title: Cassette Player!
description: Resource pack that replaces the jukebox with a cassette player.
body:
Listen to your cassettes with style! This resource pack will replace your _jukebox_ with a _cassette player_.

**(Highly recommended to use it along with [CountXD's Cassette Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cassette-music-disc-countxd) )**
